Simple Table 1 Example

zztable1

2026-06-23

Source: vignettes/simple.Rmd
simple.Rmd

A Simple Example

This vignette demonstrates the most basic usage of zztable1 with a small simulated clinical trial dataset.

set.seed(123)
trial_data <- data.frame(
  arm = factor(rep(c("Treatment", "Placebo"), each = 50)),
  age = rnorm(100, mean = 45, sd = 15),
  sex = factor(
    sample(c("Male", "Female"), 100, replace = TRUE)
  ),
  bmi = rnorm(100, mean = 26, sd = 5)
)

create_table(
  formula = arm ~ age + sex + bmi,
  data = trial_data,
  theme = "nejm",
  pvalue = TRUE
)
Variable Placebo
(N=50) 		Treatment
(N=50) 		P value
age 47.2 ± 13.6 45.5 ± 13.9 0.542
sex – no. (%) 31 (62) 20 (40) 0.045
bmi 26 ± 4.7 26.2 ± 4.7 0.802

On this page
